layout_description:
Option: OPT-1
Slide description: TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT with equal-width side-by-side content sections spanning the full slide width below the title. The left column presents Manufacturing KPCs as a numbered enumeration list with brand-colored badges and dashed separators. The right column presents J&J core capabilities as a bullet list with brand-colored circle markers and dashed separators. Both columns share identical top and bottom edges, creating a unified horizontal alignment. A full-width key takeaway bar sits at the bottom of the slide with brand accent fill and white text. The layout uses generous vertical spacing to distribute content evenly across the available slide height, with dashed separator lines providing visual rhythm between sections. No outer container is used — the columns sit directly on the slide background with appropriate margins from all edges.

Blueprint:
  Orientation: left-to-right
  Regions: 3
  Allocation: [0.48, 0.48, 0.04]

Containers:
  C0 (LEFT COLUMN — Manufacturing KPCs): Left column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at left margin with a small inset from the slide edge. Column header 'Manufacturing KPCs' rendered as bold text in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top of the column. Three enumeration sections stacked vertically with equal flexGrow distribution to fill the column height evenly. Each section contains: (1) a small filled square badge with brand primary color fill, white bold enumeration number (1, 2, 3) centered inside, positioned left-aligned and vertically centered within its row band; (2) a bold section title ('Game quality', 'Proven performance', 'Incumbent advantage') in brand dark color, positioned immediately to the right of the badge, vertically centered; (3) body text in regular weight, brand text color, left-aligned, wrapping across the available column width, positioned below the title within the same section. Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between consecutive sections (after section 1 and after section 2, but not after section 3). All three sections share identical flexGrow values to enforce equal vertical distribution. Font size target: medium body font, consistent across all three sections. Padding: small left/right insets within the column, minimal top/bottom padding within each section to maximize content space.
  C1 (RIGHT COLUMN — J&J core capabilities): Right column occupying 48% of slide width, positioned at right side of slide with a small inset from the slide edge, separated from the left column by a 4% gutter. Column header 'J&J core capabilities' rendered as bold text in brand primary color, left-aligned at the top of the column. Three bullet sections stacked vertically with equal flexGrow distribution to fill the column height evenly, matching the vertical rhythm of the left column. Each section contains: (1) a small brand-colored circle bullet marker (proportional to body text height, not oversized) positioned left-aligned at the start of the first line of text; (2) body text in regular weight, brand text color, left-aligned, wrapping across the available column width, starting immediately to the right of the circle marker. The three sections correspond to the three capability themes from the source content: regulatory navigation and Epic acquisition benefits (section 1), distributor credibility and balance sheet flexibility (section 2), and competitive differentiation through in-house development and capital scale (section 3). Thin dashed grey horizontal separator lines span the full column width between consecutive sections (after section 1 and after section 2, but not after section 3). All three sections share identical flexGrow values and identical top/bottom edge positions as the left column sections to enforce horizontal alignment across the two columns. Font size target: medium body font, identical to left column. Padding: small left/right insets within the column, minimal top/bottom padding within each section.
  C2 (KEY TAKEAWAY BAR): Full-width horizontal bar positioned at the bottom of the slide, spanning from left margin to right margin with small edge insets. Fill: brand accent color (light blue or teal from brand palette). Height: compact — just tall enough to contain the text with a small top/bottom inset, approximately 7% of slide height. Text: 'Key takeaway: Though new manufacturing entrants face hurdles to displace incumbent game providers, J&J's core capabilities, strong financial position and brand reputation position the company well to capture share in Minnesota' rendered in brand dark color (or white if contrast requires), regular weight, left-aligned with a small left inset, vertically centered within the bar. Corner radius: small visible rounding on all four corners for a polished card feel. No border. This bar sits below the two content columns with a small vertical gap separating it from the column content above.
  SC-BOTTOM (DECORATIVE BACKGROUND LAYER): Inactive. The slide content (two columns + bottom bar) fills the available space sufficiently. No additional decorative background layer is needed.
  SC-TOP (OVERLAY CONNECTOR LAYER): Inactive. No cross-container connectors or overlay elements are required for this layout.
